title: Kalshi Weather Kill Decision and Binary-Only Relaunch Spec

kill_decision.rationale: Three independent kill shots: (1) model accuracy 27-35% vs NWS settlement, (2) forecast precision ±1.5°C vs required ±0.1°C, (3) negative EV at realistic entry prices. Zero settlement reconciliation. Zero replayable forecast archive. Simulation evidence uses synthetic prices.

existing_portfolio.bracket_pattern_visible: Adjacent Chicago brackets (61-62 vs 63-64) demonstrate the core problem: one wins (+$6.12), the adjacent loses (-$2.61). Net outcome depends on which exact bracket the temperature falls in — precisely the uncertainty that kills the strategy.

market_types_allowed.example: Will it rain in NYC tomorrow?
market_types_allowed.edge_thesis: NWS PoP well-calibrated at 24h; retail uses app icons without calibration
When forecast 10+ degrees from threshold, market may price at 80-90% leaving edge

market_types_permanently_blocked: any range contract where forecast error exceeds bin width

gate_1_forecast_snapshots.description: Automated NWS forecast capture at 18:00 UTC daily for target cities
gate_1_forecast_snapshots.required: ≥20 unique city-date pairs across ≥5 calendar days

gate_2_decision_log.description: Every binary-market signal evaluated, logged with probability, price, edge, side

gate_4_positive_edge.description: win_rate × avg_win > loss_rate × avg_loss after Kalshi taker fees
gate_4_positive_edge.required: Positive EV across ≥20 settled paper decisions

binary_only_successor.kill_criterion: If after 30 calendar days of paper trading the binary lane has not passed all 4 gates, kill Kalshi weather entirely. Reallocate $100 to Kalshi non-weather markets.

capital_rules.scale_after: 20 live settled decisions with positive edge

operator_outputs.one_next_cycle_action: Begin automated binary-weather forecast snapshot capture at 18:00 UTC daily for NYC, CHI, AUS, MIA, LAX. Zero orders until snapshot archive reaches 20 city-date pairs across 5 days.

failsafe_rules.no_new_weather_capital: until all 4 binary evidence gates pass
